step_rationale: Na/K-ATPase catalytic subunit; broad cellular role; peripheral.
mechanism: ATP1A1 encodes Na/K-ATPase α1, which maintains platelet ion homeostasis and contractility, supporting but not directly driving thrombotic activation.

references.title: The Na/K-ATPase α1 subunit fine-tunes platelet P2Y12 function and mediates sex dimorphism-associated thrombosis.
